reviews.comment:
Nafta buena, te atienden bien y lo más. Importante podes inflar o checker. Las rudas sin andar. Poniendo monedas ni andar. Corriendo. Contra. Un reloj. Me parece de. Miserables cuando hacen eso y evito cargar en esas estaciones

(Translated by Google)
Good gas, they serve you well, and the best part is, you can pump your gas or check your fuel. The wheels don't work. Putting coins in doesn't work. It's a rush. A clock. I find it miserable when they do that, and I avoid filling up at those stations.
